rows.label: tev035601_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev035601_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Nokocche about the Ma-non ship.

rows.label: tev035601_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss

rows.label: tev035601_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Nokocche if anything is troubling her.

rows.label: tev035601_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Nokocche about the Growth.

rows.label: tev035601_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask Nokocche about the Growth.

rows.label: tev035601_MSG0001
rows.name:
Since arriving on Mira, we've lost all
contact with the Ma-non fleet, you see? So
we we have no idea where the others are.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035601_MSG0002
rows.name:
But I can tell you this: our civilian vessel
is nothing compared to the planetoid-sized
goliaths in the rest of our fleet, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035601_MSG0003
rows.name:
Those ships have been to myriad planets and boarded
a whole slew of xenoforms, all of whom contribute
to our intellectual communion, if you follow?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035601_MSG0004
rows.name:
I can only hope that our own ship
becomes a similar hub of of culture
one day. It's my private wish, I guess?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035601_MSG0007
rows.name:
Did you know that I have traveled
to more planets than I can count
on on these two hands?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035601_MSG0008
rows.name:
I have met the inhabitants of these planets,
and they have each enriched me with their
own surprising dose of culture, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035601_MSG0009
rows.name:
I was hoping that Mira would lead to
similar introductions to equally
stimulating xenoformic races, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035601_MSG0010
rows.name:
Well, it seems that most of the aliens
inhabiting Mira are violent sycophants who
serve the Growth's wishes, am I right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035601_MSG0011
rows.name:
Don't you know any NICE species
who live on Mira? If so, maybe
you could...introduce me?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035601_MSG0015
rows.name:
I hear that some races who obey the Growth
were forced into servitude, correct?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035601_MSG0021
rows.name:
Surely these races are watching humanity
very closely, don't you think?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035601_MSG0022
rows.name:
The Growth are afraid of humans,
which makes you a beacon of hope—or
even a potential emancipator?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035601_MSG0023
rows.name:
If you meet any xenoforms who seem open
to diplomacy, you should maybe listen
to what they have to say, all right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035601_MSG0030
rows.name:
It is said other races have
tried in their own ways to
defy the Growth, haven't they?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035601_MSG0031
rows.name:
But they each failed, and either
were subjugated in turn or
else...annihilated? Er, as I hear it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035601_MSG0032
rows.name:
So you humans are the first to ever
really stand up to them, understand?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035601_MSG0033
rows.name:
I feel as though I am witnessing
history in the making, don't you? It
is a very pleasant feeling indeed![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035601_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Nokocche about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035601_MSG1001
rows.name:
I was walking along the other day
when I got sprayed with the the
nastiest liquid! So gross, am I right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035601_MSG1002
rows.name:
I didn't know what to do other than gag, you
know? But thankfully, this Zaruboggan fellow
named Atheron came along and and saved the day.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035601_MSG1003
rows.name:
How do I even put it into words? One wave of that
staff of his, and the icky mess that had mucked up
my day just...vanished. Almost like magic, you see?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035601_MSG1004
rows.name:
Well, we got to talking, and I
realized I had found a true friend.
So here we we are, I guess?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035601_MSG1005
rows.name:
NLA is quite the city. Never
a dull moment, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035601_SEL2021
rows.name: Ask Nokocche about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035601_MSG2001
rows.name:
I have been around the galactic block, so
to speak, and have forged relationships with
many a xenoform in my time, understand?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035601_MSG2002
rows.name:
But Atheron is the first who I feel
I can share anything with, you know?
He is a true and genuine friend.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035601_MSG2003
rows.name:
I hope that we will still be telling
each other stories like this in
the centuries to come, maybe?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035601_MSG2004
rows.name:
Thank you for bringing us together,
okay? I hope my friendship with
you lasts every bit as long.[ST:wait ]
